title: Icy Sashimi Turkish Chicken Breast Doner Kebab
description: Prepare a refreshing twist on the classic Turkish Doner Kebab, featuring sashimi-cut chicken breast and a briny, creamy sauce. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt and black pepper.
On a cedar plank or a large cutting board, arrange the chicken breast in a horizontal position.
Spread the Feta cheese evenly over the chicken breast, leaving a thin border around the edges.
In a small bowl, mix together the lemon juice, minced garlic, and chopped parsley.
Spread the lemon-garlic mixture evenly over the Feta cheese.
Place the chicken breast on the preheated oven rack and bake for 20 minutes.
After 20 minutes, remove the chicken from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, toast the Turkish bread slices for a few minutes.
Cut the sashimi-cut chicken breast into thin strips, using a sharp knife.
Serve the chicken breast strips on the toasted Turkish bread slices with a dollop of Icy Sashimi Sauce.
Garnish with a sprinkle of fresh mint leaves and serve immediately.
Repeat the process for the remaining chicken breast.
Freeze the leftovers and enjoy them in a future meal.
Garnish with additional parsley and cilantro if desired.
Transfer the chicken to a serving plate and serve immediately.
Garnish with a sprinkle of feta cheese if desired.
Serve with a side of ice cubes to keep the chicken breast chilled.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
